text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your hard work, Trainer! You're
really giving it your all, aren't you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And you know, that time of year has finally come
again!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy's annual summer camp will soon
begin!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! ♪ You'll be staying by the beach,
and utilizing the venue for a change in training
programs.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the new environment will help your
trainee improve in leaps and bounds!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Camp starts in July, so make sure she's in tip-top
condition to dive in and make the most of it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But it'll be over before you know it! You won't
have much time to rest.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's what I want to hear! Summer camp is
going to be so much fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, training should be our foremost
concern, but...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Once in a while, you should go to the beach for
some recreation! It might be good for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I think your trainee will feel refreshed and
invigorated!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Although it's only a short period of two months
from July through August...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll spend a fruitful summer with your
trainee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tazuna tells me all about summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to pay attention to
<chrname>'s condition and energy
leading up to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It starts two turns from now in early July, so I
should probably start preparing now.
